purpose: UI-ready proposal register for the future WellFit Agent Control Center. This register connects existing agent catalog, task queue, risk classifier, definition of done, research governance, and quality gate structures without granting runtime, merge, deploy, approval, protected-scope, or production-data authority.
proposal_schema_note: Every proposal must keep can_auto_merge=false and can_auto_deploy=false. High and critical proposals must keep can_auto_execute=false unless marked future_manual_only with explicit human approval and no current execution authority.

proposals.title: Product Intelligence Review
proposals.summary: Review existing Product Intelligence Agent governance outputs and identify safe product-readiness insights without runtime personalization or protected data processing.
proposals.expected_value: Improves product decision quality while preserving planning-only and report-only boundaries.
proposals.next_action: Admin/Owner reviews whether this should become a Codex report-only task draft.

proposals.title: Website UX Audit
proposals.summary: Prepare a report-only website UX audit using existing route, website-agent, visual smoke, and site-quality audit structures.
proposals.expected_value: Finds safe navigation, copy, and route-readiness gaps without changing UI runtime code.
proposals.next_action: Area owner may approve a report-only audit task; no runtime UI change is authorized.

proposals.title: MVP Scope Check
proposals.summary: Compare current MVP/Alpha scope docs, roadmap tasks, TODO index, and product-readiness registers to detect duplicate or stale scope items.
proposals.expected_value: Reduces roadmap drift and keeps the next beta tasks aligned with existing governance.
proposals.next_action: Prepare a report-only scope-drift task if no duplicate existing task covers it.

proposals.title: Controlled Research Request
proposals.summary: Create an internal-first research proposal before external research influences roadmap, website, investor, product, legal, privacy, health, child-safety, location, camera, token, payment, reward, or mission-authority content.
proposals.expected_value: Prevents uncontrolled internet learning and preserves source-quality review before recommendations affect WellFit decisions.
proposals.next_action: Owner/Admin approves or rejects the research proposal before external findings are incorporated.

proposals.title: Codex Task Generation
proposals.summary: Generate structured Codex task drafts from approved proposals using first-read files, allowed/blocked paths, scope, checks, risk and reporting requirements.
proposals.expected_value: Turns approved proposals into safer, reviewable implementation prompts without granting execution, merge, or deploy authority.
proposals.next_action: Prepare a report-only generator design; do not execute generated tasks automatically.

proposals.title: Admin Agent Center UI Planning
proposals.summary: Plan a future read-only Admin Agent Center UI at /admin/agent-center or /admin/cognitive-core without building routes, APIs, Firebase writes, auth roles, or approval buttons in this task.
proposals.expected_value: Defines the smallest safe UI path for proposal visibility before any interactive approval surface is built.
proposals.next_action: Review the read-only UI concept in a later PR; do not create runtime UI files now.
